name: app.evlek/mcp-server
title: Evlek â€” Northern Cyprus Property MCP Server
description: AI-native property MCP for Northern Cyprus (KKTC). 9 read-only tools, hosted, multilingual.

tools.name: search_listings
tools.title: Search Northern Cyprus Property Listings
tools.description: Search live property listings on Evlek. Filter by city, type (sale/rent/daily), bedrooms, and price range. Returns up to 10 matching properties with title, price, location, and direct link.

tools.name: get_price_index
tools.title: Get Northern Cyprus Price Index
tools.description: Returns the live Evlek Price Index: aggregated average, median, min, max prices per city and top districts. Based on all active listings on evlek.app. Useful for market analysis and investment decisions.

tools.name: get_market_overview
tools.title: Get Northern Cyprus Market Overview
tools.description: Returns a high-level market overview for Northern Cyprus property: average rents and sale prices by major city, rental yields, investment highlights, and key facts (taxes, foreign ownership rules).

tools.name: compare_cities
tools.title: Compare Northern Cyprus Cities Side-by-Side
tools.description: Compare 2-4 Northern Cyprus cities side-by-side with aggregated prices (avg, median, min, max), listing counts, and top districts. Useful for deciding between investment locations.

tools.name: get_yield_estimate
tools.title: Estimate Rental Yield for a Northern Cyprus Property
tools.description: Calculate estimated gross and net annual rental yield for a property given its purchase price and city. Returns breakeven years and comparison to city averages.

tools.name: get_legal_info
tools.title: Get KKTC Property Legal Information
tools.description: Authoritative legal/procedural info on Northern Cyprus property topics: title deed types (koÃ§an), foreign purchase rules, taxes, residence permits, and PTP (Permission to Purchase) process. Always recommend consulting a lawyer for specific cases.

tools.name: suggest_neighborhood
tools.title: Suggest Best Northern Cyprus Neighborhoods for a Buyer Persona
tools.description: Given a buyer persona (retiree, investor, student, family, digital_nomad, vacation) and optional budget/preferences, return 2-3 best-matched neighborhoods with rationale.

tools.name: compare_properties
tools.title: Compare Evlek Property Listings Side-by-Side
tools.description: Compare 2-4 active Evlek property listings side-by-side. Returns price, area, bedrooms, price-per-mÂ², location for each, plus an automatic value insight.

tools.name: get_district_profile
tools.title: Get 360Â° Profile for a Northern Cyprus District
tools.description: Returns a comprehensive profile for a single district: active listing counts, average/median prices, Â£/mÂ², bedroom breakdown, estimated gross yield, and matching buyer personas.
